title: Review round 2: wolfhsm API idiomaticity changes
notes: Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — four P1 issues remain: missing ERASED-key guard in ECC/Ed25519/Curve25519 generate (silent bad handles), SHE block-size validation using wrong error variant, she_verify_mac bool return inconsistent with all other verify methods, and newtype inner fields pub bypassing abstraction. No soundness holes; all issues are API contract and diagnostic quality gaps that accumulate maintenance debt as the crate grows.
